flags.summary: In-state tuition at The University of Tampa rose 10% between 2021 and 2024 ($31.3k → $34.4k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at The University of Tampa fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.8% → 0.0%).
